body: Just booked a ryokan in Hakone with a private onsen. So excited to see Mt Fuji from the hot spring!
Hakone is gorgeous. Take the ropeway for views of Fuji and visit Owakudani for the black eggs.
Is it true that each black egg adds seven years to your life? I'll take a dozen!
Ha! That's the legend. They're just regular eggs cooked in the volcanic hot springs. The sulfur turns the shell black.
The Hakone Free Pass is great value — covers the loop of train, bus, ropeway, and pirate ship across Lake Ashi.
